diagram_title: Generic Branch Repo MCP CICD — Functional 上下文

activities.title: 解析 專案 上下文
activities.description: Infer 或 validate repo root, base branch, branch naming policy, beta worktree policy, 與 runtime launcher policy.

activities.title: Prepare Feature Loop
activities.description: Create 或 reuse feature branch 與 attach beta worktree 來自 cms.

activities.title: Validate Feature Runtime
activities.description: Switch main worktree 到 feature branch 與 launch web runtime 供 manual verification.

activities.title: Finalize Feature Branch
activities.description: 合併 verified feature branch 回到 進入 cms 與 perform guarded cleanup.

arrows.label: Repo 與 任務 上下文
Merged Base Branch 與 Cleanup Report
